title: Bifrenaria barbosae
taxonomy: Bifrenaria barbosae is classified as a species of orchid within the genus Bifrenaria. This genus is part of the subtribe Bifrenariinae, which is a group of orchids that are native to South America. Bifrenaria barbosae is further classified as a member of the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. The classification of Bifrenaria barbosae is also reflected in its taxonomic ranking as a species within the kingdom Plantae. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Bifrenaria barbosae shares characteristics with other orchids, including its unique flower structure and growth habits.
